category_sources: Official Ente repository says Ente is an end-to-end encrypted platform for photos, authenticators, and more: https://github.com/ente-io/ente
source_facts.description says the CLI exports data from Ente and decrypts Ente Auth export.
display_name_sources: Official repository contains a cli directory in the Ente monorepo: https://github.com/ente-io/ente.
docs_sources: Official Ente monorepo README describes the platform and links to ente.com: https://github.com/ente-io/ente#readme.
Official repository contains a cli directory for the CLI source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ente-io/ente; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Ente README and topics identify photos, encryption, e2ee, and end-to-end encryption: https://github.com/ente-io/ente#readme.
source_facts.description identifies export and decrypt operations for Ente and Ente Auth.
